name: @diffpal/azure-devops-extension
description: Azure DevOps extension and pipeline task for DiffPal review

scripts.package:prod: npm run build && mkdir -p ../../dist && tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json --output-path ../../dist/diffpal.vsix
scripts.package:dev: npm run build && mkdir -p ../../dist && tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.dev.json --output-path ../../dist/diffpal-dev.vsix
scripts.publish:prod: npm run build && tfx extension publish --manifest-globs vss-extension.json
scripts.publish:dev: npm run build && tfx extension publish --manifest-globs vss-extension.dev.json
